data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'I'm on my way' notifications, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. While the linked use case mentions that customers receive notifications when the service provider is approaching, there is no evidence of actual implementation or validation of this feature. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to satisfy the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming 'I'm on my way' notifications.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the 'I'm on my way' notifications.
